attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL)

 select CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = STG_CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
